reviews.comment:
Lamentable la atención. Pasamos el lunes 27 de diciembre. Llenamos el tranque, y resulta que no nos quisieron cobrar con débito, no con la app no transferencia. Solo efectivo. Y para completar el playero se divertia en la icara de todos.

Además no te cargaban los puntos de servi club tampoco.

En el shoping.... Además de los precios x el techo.... Toda la bebida caliente.

Pésima atención

(Translated by Google)
The service was appalling. We went on Monday, December 27th. We filled up the tank, and they wouldn't accept debit, the app, or a transfer. Cash only. And to top it all off, the attendant was making fun of everyone.

They also wouldn't credit our Servi Club points.

At the shopping center... Besides the exorbitant prices... all the drinks were warm.

Terrible service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtN3FIWG13RRAB

reviews.comment:
El domingo 26 de Diciembre de 2021... podias cargar combustible pagando SOLO CON EFECTIVO. NO FUNCIONABA LA APP..NI OTRO MEDIO DE PAGO DIGITAL.NOS TUVIMOS QUE IR...A OTRA ESTACION. Y HACER UNA FILA LARGUISIMA CON 2 NIÑOS A BORDO...UN GARRON...MALISIMO.

(Translated by Google)
On Sunday, December 26, 2021... you could only fill up with fuel by paying with cash. The app wasn't working, nor were any other digital payment methods. We had to go to another station and wait in a very long line with two children in the car... a real pain... terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbHRUUGVREAE

reviews.comment:
40 minutos de demora para cargar combustible, no aceptan debito ni credito ni qr hace 3 dias, se pusieron a hacer el cambio de turno con 40 autos en la estacion esperando para cargar. Forros.

(Translated by Google)
40-minute delay in fueling. They don't accept debit, credit, or QR codes. Three days ago, they started doing shift change with 40 cars at the station waiting to fuel up. It's a pain.
